summary.key_theme: Honeywell 繳出優於預期的第 2 季財報並上調全年 EPS 指引，但因業務拆分導致營收預期下調，市場對其獲利能力與成長動能看法分歧。

bullish.title: Honeywell International Inc (HON) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
bullish.reason: 公司第 2 季財報表現亮眼，每股盈餘 (EPS) 達 1.95 美元，優於市場預期的 1.82 美元，且營收表現超出預期 4.19%，顯示自動化業務成長強勁。

bullish.title: Honeywell Raises EPS Outlook, Cuts Sales Forecast After First Post-Split Earnings
bullish.reason: 儘管營收預期因拆分調整，但公司上調了 2026 全年調整後 EPS 指引，顯示管理層對核心業務獲利能力的信心。

bullish.title: Honeywell (HON) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript — Organic sales grew 4% as orders surged 16%, with backlog up 9% year over year.
bullish.reason: 訂單量激增 16% 且積壓訂單 (Backlog) 年增 9%，為未來營收成長提供強大能見度。

bearish.title: Honeywell International CEO Says Expects Divestures Of Productivity Solution And Services, Warehouse And Workforce Solution Business By Early August 2026; Divestitures About 2 Months Ahead Of Initial Assumption, Has Reduced 2026 Revenue Expectation By ~$400M
bearish.reason: 因提前進行業務剝離，導致 2026 年營收預期被下調約 4 億美元，短期內對營收規模造成負面影響。

bearish.title: Honeywell Intl Sees Q3 Adj EPS $2.05-$2.20 vs $2.06 Est; Sees Sales $4.900B-$5.000B vs $5.253B Est
bearish.reason: 第 3 季營收指引區間 49 億至 50 億美元，低於市場共識的 52.53 億美元，引發市場對成長放緩的擔憂。

bearish.title: Why Honeywell Technologies Earnings Caused Honeywell Aerospace Stock to Fall
bearish.reason: 財報發布後，市場對拆分後的航太業務板塊產生估值修正，導致相關股價出現波動。
